backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor that composes blob storage and authorization mixins, and exposes user profile CRUD endpoints with role-based access control checks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the client-side PDF generation feature for payslips, listing the relevant files, components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON file containing short summaries of three frontend source files: StatutorySettings.tsx, pdfGenerator.ts, and PayslipView.tsx.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, sidebar, and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Indian Payroll System React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes, handles Internet Identity authentication state, and conditionally renders the login page or profile setup modal.
frontend/src/components/AppSidebar.tsx: Application sidebar component rendering navigation links for main menu and configuration sections, with active-state highlighting, user profile display, and logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/AttendanceEntryF: Dialog form component for entering employee attendance data for a given month, including present days, leave breakdown by type, and automatic LOP/paid days calculation.
frontend/src/components/EmployeeDeleteCo: Alert dialog component that prompts the user to confirm deactivation of an employee record, showing the employee's name and ID with a destructive action button.
frontend/src/components/EmployeeForm.tsx: A dialog form component for creating or editing an employee, with tabbed sections for personal, employment, statutory, and bank details, including validation for PAN and Aadhaar.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout component that wraps pages with a sidebar, header breadcrumb, footer, and toast notifications using TanStack Router's Outlet.
frontend/src/components/LoginPage.tsx: Login page with a two-panel design showcasing payroll features on the left and an Internet Identity sign-in button on the right.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that collects a new user's name and email on first login and saves the profile via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/SalaryStructureF: A dialog form for creating or editing salary structures, allowing configuration of earnings and deduction components with live gross/net pay calculation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using the user's Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttendance.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for reading and writing monthly attendance records and leave balances from local storage.
frontend/src/hooks/useEmployees.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on employees stored in localStorage, including filtering by department/designation/search and duplicate PAN/Aadhaar validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useLeaveTypes.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on leave types stored in localStorage, falling back to default leave types when none exist.
frontend/src/hooks/usePayroll.ts: Provides React Query hooks for managing payroll runs in localStorage, supporting initiation, approval, unlocking, and marking payroll as paid with aggregated totals.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch and save the caller's user profile via a backend actor, with loading state derived from both actor and query status.
frontend/src/hooks/useSalaryStructures.t: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on salary structures stored in localStorage, with timestamp tracking on create and update.
Provides React Query hooks to read and update statutory settings (EPF, ESI, PT, LWF) in localStorage, with hardcoded defaults for multiple Indian states.
frontend/src/hooks/useTaxSettings.ts: Provides React Query hooks for managing tax settings and per-employee tax declarations in localStorage, supporting upsert of declarations by employee ID.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter and JetBrains Mono fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes including colors for sidebar, charts, success, and warning states.
frontend/src/lib/calculations.ts: Utility library providing currency formatting, PAN/Aadhaar/account masking and validation, working-day calculation, salary component computation from a structure, and statutory deduction (EPF, ESI, PT, LWF) calculations.
frontend/src/lib/exportCSV.ts: Exports an array of records to a CSV file by building header and data rows, handling commas and quotes, then triggering a browser download via a Blob URL.
frontend/src/lib/pdfGenerator.ts: Generates a printable payslip by building a self-contained HTML string with inline styles that lays out employee earnings and deductions, intended for PDF rendering via a browser print or headless renderer.
frontend/src/lib/storage.ts: Provides typed localStorage get/save helpers and a STORAGE_KEYS constant map for persisting payroll entities such as employees, salary structures, statutory settings, and payroll runs.
frontend/src/lib/uuid.ts: Exports a single v4() function that generates a random RFC 4122-compliant UUID string using Math.random().
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
Page component for viewing and editing monthly attendance records per employee, displaying present days, leaves, LOP, and paid days in a table with an inline edit form.
frontend/src/pages/ComplianceReports.tsx: Page component that generates and exports PF ECR, ESI challan, PT returns, and quarterly TDS summary reports from payroll run data, with month/year/quarter selectors and CSV download buttons.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying summary cards for employee count, current/last payroll totals, and upcoming compliance deadlines (PF, ESI, TDS, PT). Fetches employee and payroll run data via custom hooks and provides navigation shortcuts.
frontend/src/pages/EmployeeManagement.ts: Employee list page with search and department filter, supporting add, edit, and delete operations via a table UI. Uses EmployeeForm and EmployeeDeleteConfirmation components alongside employee hooks.
frontend/src/pages/LeaveConfiguration.ts: Leave type configuration page allowing admins to create, edit, and delete leave types with fields like quota, carry-forward, paid status, and LOP flag. Uses dialogs and alert dialogs for form and delete confirmation flows.
frontend/src/pages/PayrollProcessing.tsx: Payroll processing page for initiating, approving, unlocking, and marking payroll runs as paid for a selected month/year. Computes per-employee payroll data including statutory deductions and TDS from stored attendance and tax declaration records.
frontend/src/pages/PayslipView.tsx: Payslip viewer page that lets users select an employee, month, and year to display a formatted payslip. Supports browser print and PDF download via a generatePayslipPDF utility.
frontend/src/pages/SalaryStructures.tsx: Page component for managing salary structures, displaying a grid of cards with earnings/deductions info, and supporting create, edit, and delete operations via a form and confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/StatutorySettings.tsx: Page component for configuring Indian statutory deduction settings (EPF, ESI, Professional Tax, LWF) with tabbed UI and save functionality.
frontend/src/pages/TaxSettings.tsx: Page component for configuring income tax slabs for old and new regimes along with TDS parameters, featuring editable slab tables and save functionality.
frontend/src/types/attendance.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for leave types, leave balances, and monthly attendance records, along with default leave type constants (EL, CL, SL, LOP).
frontend/src/types/employee.ts: Defines the Employee interface with personal, employment, statutory, bank, and salary fields, plus helper constants for departments and Indian states.
frontend/src/types/payroll.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for a payroll run and per-employee payroll data, including earnings, deductions, statutory contributions, and run status lifecycle.
frontend/src/types/payslip.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for payslip earnings, deductions, and the full Payslip structure including employee identifiers, attendance, and employer contributions.
frontend/src/types/reports.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for statutory report records including PF ECR, ESI challan, PT returns, and TDS summary data.
frontend/src/types/salaryStructure.ts: Defines interfaces for salary structure components (earnings and deductions) and the SalaryStructure entity, along with default earnings and deductions component arrays.
frontend/src/types/statutory.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for statutory configuration including PT slabs, LWF config, overall statutory settings, and a deduction breakdown structure.
frontend/src/types/tax.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for tax settings, slabs, declarations, and TDS projections, along with default FY 2024-25 tax slab values for old and new regimes.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme tokens (colors via OKLCH variables, fonts, border radius, shadows, animations) and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for an Indian payroll system, tracking implemented features, architectural notes on statutory deductions and income tax rules, and versioning information.
